# AVL hard: stored run case

Wrap the `avl` executable, load stored geometry/mass/run inputs, execute a saved run case, and retain forces plus stability reports.

## Why This Case Exists

A harder AVL challenge should move beyond a toy single-angle solve and prove that the wrapper can drive AVL's checked-in run-case workflow with real persisted inputs.

## Case Shape

- ID: `avl_hard`
- Family: `avl`
- Difficulty: `hard`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `command`
- Workflow Slice: `aerodynamics`
- Target Kind: `command`
- Upstream Target: `avl`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/avl_hard/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

This case relies on its workflow without extra breadth assertions.

## Why This Stays A Challenge

This case keeps its ingestion recipe and workflow assertions in
`challenge.toml` instead of checking in companion `ingest.py` and
`use.py` scripts. That boundary is intentional: the challenge lane
should stay a compact problem statement rather than turning into a
worked answer key like the real-world example lane.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=avl_hard
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only avl_hard
```

## Prepared Inputs

- Render `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.avl` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.avl` before the workflow runs.
- Render `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.mass` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.mass` before the workflow runs.
- Render `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.run` to `{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.run` before the workflow runs.

## Fixtures

- `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.avl`
- `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.mass`
- `challenges/cases/avl_hard/fixtures/plane.run`

## Workflow

### 1. Execute the stored Plane Vanilla AVL run case and retain forces plus stability reports

Tool: `run_avl`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "cwd": "{challenge_artifact_dir}",
  "extra_argv": [
    "plane.avl",
    "plane.run",
    "plane.mass"
  ],
  "stdin_text": "PLOP\nG\n\nOPER\n1\nX\nFT\nplane_forces.txt\nST\nplane_stability.txt\n\nQUIT\n"
}
```

Expectations: json fields {'exit_code': 0}; files are non-empty ['{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane_forces.txt', '{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane_stability.txt'].

## What This Case Proves

- The challenge harness can preload multiple AVL input files and run a saved operating case deterministically.
- A command wrapper can drive a more realistic AVL workflow with control surfaces, mass properties, and stored run-state.
- The retained artifacts remain inspectable enough to show what AVL actually solved.

## Known Limits

- This case still stops at operating-point analysis rather than AVL's eigenmode tools.
- This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` when `avl` is not installed.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: step up to AVL's stored run-case machinery.
# This uses checked-in geometry, mass, and run files from the official sample flow.
id = "avl_hard"
title = "AVL hard: stored run case"
tier = "local_full"
style = "command"
slice = "aerodynamics"
family = "avl"
difficulty = "hard"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `avl` executable, load stored geometry/mass/run inputs, execute a saved run case, and retain forces plus stability reports."
motivation = "A harder AVL challenge should move beyond a toy single-angle solve and prove that the wrapper can drive AVL's checked-in run-case workflow with real persisted inputs."
proves = [
  "The challenge harness can preload multiple AVL input files and run a saved operating case deterministically.",
  "A command wrapper can drive a more realistic AVL workflow with control surfaces, mass properties, and stored run-state.",
  "The retained artifacts remain inspectable enough to show what AVL actually solved.",
]
limitations = [
  "This case still stops at operating-point analysis rather than AVL's eigenmode tools.",
  "This case intentionally reports `skipped_unavailable` when `avl` is not installed.",
]

[target]
kind = "command"
value = ["avl"]

[probe]
commands = [["avl"]]

[scaffold]
kind = "command"
function_name = "run_avl"
help_probe_args = ["-h"]

[setup]
[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/plane.avl"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.avl"

[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/plane.mass"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.mass"

[[setup.rendered_files]]
source = "fixtures/plane.run"
destination = "{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane.run"

[workflow]
[[workflow.steps]]
label = "Execute the stored Plane Vanilla AVL run case and retain forces plus stability reports"
tool = "run_avl"

[workflow.steps.arguments]
cwd = "{challenge_artifact_dir}"
extra_argv = ["plane.avl", "plane.run", "plane.mass"]
stdin_text = """
PLOP
G

OPER
1
X
FT
plane_forces.txt
ST
plane_stability.txt

QUIT
"""

[workflow.steps.expect]
json_fields = { exit_code = 0 }
files_nonempty = [
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane_forces.txt",
  "{challenge_artifact_dir}/plane_stability.txt",
]
```
